29 _14 ADMSN_CLS_CD (14) Admission Class CHAR 2 The patient's admission classification. 01 = Initial Rehab, 02 = Evaluation, 03 = Readmission, 04 = Unplanned Discharge, 05 = Continuing Rehabilitation.
